# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault (must be globally unique)
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure region for Key Vault deployment
  tenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD tenant ID
  authorizedServicePrincipals:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: Array of service principal object IDs that require secret access
    defaultValue: []
  enabledForDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Allow Azure Virtual Machines to retrieve certificates
  enabledForTemplateDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Allow Azure Resource Manager to retrieve secrets during deployment
  enabledForDiskEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Allow Azure Disk Encryption to retrieve secrets
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable soft delete for recovery protection
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 90
    minValue: 7
    maxValue: 90
    metadata:
      description: Soft delete retention period in days
  enablePurgeProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable purge protection to prevent permanent deletion
  enableRbacAuthorization:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Use Azure RBAC for authorization instead of access policies
  networkAclsDefaultAction:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Deny"
    allowedValues:
      - "Allow"
      - "Deny"
    metadata:
      description: Default network access rule - Deny for production security
  allowedIpRanges:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed IP address ranges in CIDR notation
  allowedSubnetIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed virtual network subnet resource IDs
  bypassAzureServices:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "AzureServices"
    allowedValues:
      - "AzureServices"
      - "None"
    metadata:
      description: Allow trusted Azure services to bypass network rules
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "standard"
    allowedValues:
      - "standard"
      - "premium"
    metadata:
      description: Key Vault SKU - premium includes HSM-backed keys
  enableDiagnostics:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable diagnostic logging for audit and monitoring
  logAnalyticsWorkspaceId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Log Analytics workspace resource ID for diagnostics
variables:
  keyVaultApiVersion: "2023-02-01"
  diagnosticSettingsName: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '-diagnostics')]"
  secretsPermissionsReadOnly: [
    "get"
    "list"
  ]
  networkRules: {
    bypass: "[parameters('bypassAzureServices')]"
    defaultAction: "[parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction')]"
    ipRules: "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpRanges')), 0), map(parameters('allowedIpRanges'), lambda('ip', createObject('value', lambdaVariables('ip')))), createArray())]"
    virtualNetworkRules: "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedSubnetIds')), 0), map(parameters('allowedSubnetIds'), lambda('subnet', createObject('id', lambdaVariables('subnet')))), createArray())]"
  }
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "[variables('keyVaultApiVersion')]"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      enabledForDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]"
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]"
      enabledForDiskEncryption: "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]"
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      enablePurgeProtection: "[if(parameters('enablePurgeProtection'), true(), null())]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
      networkAcls: "[variables('networkRules')]"
      publicNetworkAccess: "[if(equals(parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction'), 'Deny'), 'Disabled', 'Enabled')]"
      accessPolicies: "[if(parameters('enableRbacAuthorization'), createArray(), map(parameters('authorizedServicePrincipals'), lambda('principal', createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', lambdaVariables('principal'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', variables('secretsPermissionsReadOnly'))))))]"
    tags:
      environment: development
      managedBy: ARM-Template
      securityLevel: restricted
  - condition: "[and(parameters('enableDiagnostics'), not(empty(parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceId'))))]"
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: "2021-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/', variables('diagnosticSettingsName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      workspaceId: "[parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceId')]"
      logs:
        - category: AuditEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
        - category: AzurePolicyEvaluationDetails
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
      metrics:
        - category: AllMetrics
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    description: Resource ID of the Key Vault
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    description: URI of the Key Vault for secret access
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    description: Name of the deployed Key Vault
